title: albizia lophantha var. montana
intro: Albizia lophantha var. montana, also known as the Mountain Albizia or Philippine Albizia, is a deciduous tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Albizia lophantha var. montana include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
